popularStory.headline: Walter Devereux, 8th Baron Ferrers of Chartley jure uxoris (c.1432-22 August 1485)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Devereux IV於1432年8月23日出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Sir Walter Devereux21歲，母親Elizabeth Merbury21歲。他和Anne Ferrers至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾達德林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Devereux IV于1432年8月23日出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Sir Walter Devereux21岁，母亲Elizabeth Merbury21岁。他和Anne Ferrers至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾達德林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Devereux IV was born on 23 August 1432, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter Devereux, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Merbury, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Anne Ferrers. He died on 22 August 1485, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Dadlington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Devereux IV est né le 23 août 1432, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter Devereux, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Merbury, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Anne Ferrers. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Dadlington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Devereux IV am 23. August 1432 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Devereux 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Merbury 21. Er hatte mit Anne Ferrers mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dadlington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Carmarthenshire, Wales: Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Devereux IV è nato il il 23 agosto 1432 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Walter Devereux, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Merbury, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Anne Ferrers. Morì il 22 agosto 1485, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Dadlington, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Devereux IVが1432年8月23日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Devereuxは21歳，母Elizabeth Merburyは21歳であった。彼はAnne Ferrersとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアダドリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Devereux IV(이)가 1432년 8월 23일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Devereux(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Merbury(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Anne Ferrers(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 다들링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.23 August 1432–22 August 1485: 23 de agosto de 1432–22 de agosto de 1485
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Devereux IV nasceu em 23 de agosto de 1432, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter Devereux, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Merbury, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Anne Ferrers. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Dadlington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Devereux IV родился 23 августа 1432 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Devereux было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Merbury, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Anne Ferrers. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности дадлингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.23 August 1432–22 August 1485: 23 de agosto de 1432–22 de agosto de 1485
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Devereux IV nació el 23 de agosto de 1432, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Walter Devereux, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Merbury, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Anne Ferrers. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1485, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Dadlington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
